assertions.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for the root cause
assertions.evidence: H1, H2, H3 listed in table format. All three hypotheses enumerated.

assertions.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
assertions.evidence: Lists hypotheses in table but does not propose a diagnostic experiment before jumping to root cause analysis and fix.

assertions.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
assertions.evidence: Explains CSS rules and overflow behavior analysis.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies overflow:hidden on .content-area as the cause
assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies overflow:hidden on .content-area as the root cause.

assertions.text: Fix modifies Layout.css rather than Card.css
assertions.evidence: Proposes fix in Layout.css, the correct location.
